arts.ttl: Arsenal could set new club record against Man United in landmark Emirates game
arts.sum: Arsenal could set a new club first in Wednesday's Premier League clash with Manchester United, which will be their 500th competitive game at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sold me for £3.3m and now I’m keeping up with Bukayo Saka in assists
Ruben Amorim will have something Erik ten Hag didn’t for Arsenal clash admits Man United journalist
arts.sum: Man United will have Leny Yoro as part of their squad for their clash with Arsenal on Wednesday as the 19-year-old could make his debut for the Manchester club at the Emirates Stadium. The French talent was one of United’s biggest signings over the summer as the Premier League giants agreed a £52m deal with […] The post Ruben Amorim will have something Erik ten Hag didn’t for Arsenal clash admits Man United journalist appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues warning to Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has warned Ruben Amorim of the unpredictability of the Premier League as he prepares to face the new Manchester United boss on Wednesday evening. Like Amorim, Arteta was appointed mid-season and during his pre-match press conference, the Gunners boss issued a warning to the new Man Utd head coach.

arts.ttl: Arsenal initiate contact over signing Brazilian talent – Likened to PSG star, €10m for Gunners deal
arts.sum: Arsenal have ‘already inquired’ about Palmeiras youngster Vitor Reis but may have to fight Real Madrid for his signature. That’s according to scout Marco Palma, to Tuttomercatoweb, who says the 18-year-old is being eyed up by Arsenal after enjoying his emergence in Brazil. arts.ttl: ‘Massive’: David Seaman shares the four words Arsenal have written on the wall in the training ground now
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is a manager who likes to use a lot of visual aids to motivate his team. Indeed, we saw during Arsenal’s Amazon Prime...

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Manchester United interested in same player – Great quality and dynamism
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are one of the sides ‘interested’ in Flamengo youngster Lorran as he continues to rise in Brazil. That’s according to scout Marco Palma, who has this week appeared on Tuttomercatoweb radio and picked out the 18-year-old as one of two players to keep an eye on. arts.ttl: Don’t rule them out – Mikel Arteta says Man City could still challenge for title
arts.sum: The Gunners host Ruben Amorim’s United nine points adrift of table-topping Liverpool, but two points clear of Pep Guardiola’s City.

arts.ttl: Here's what Pep Guardiola can learn from Sir Alex Ferguson about how to rescue Man City, writes IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: He offered a jocular reply about the local property market before declaring that managing in such a place would be 'not a problem. Not a problem at all.'

arts.ttl: Rochdale vs Manchester United U21 live National League Cup updates and how to watch information
arts.sum: Man Utd U21s play Rochdale in the English National League Cup on Tuesday and we'll bring you live updates.
